name: Heap Patterns — K Largest, Median Stream, Task Scheduling

metadata.career_relevance: K Largest (min-heap size k) and Find Median from Data Stream are top-5 heap interview questions at every company. The Two-Heap technique for median is a classic that appears at Google and Amazon.

hook.what_you_will_build: Heap Patterns — K Largest, Median Stream, Task Scheduling

key_takeaways: K Largest: min-heap of size k. When size>k: poll(). Answer: heap top.
K Closest to origin: max-heap size k on distance. Or sort O(n log n).
Kth Largest Stream: maintain min-heap size k; add each element; return peek()
Median Stream: two heaps — max-heap (lower half) + min-heap (upper half). Balance after each insert.
Top K Frequent: freq map + min-heap size k sorted by frequency
Meeting Rooms II: sort by start; min-heap of end times; rooms = max heap size
reflection.next_topic_preview: Next: Priority Queue Design — lazy deletion, delayed removal techniques.
